title: Hi Tarsus, state your internal LLM...

messages.content:
**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

I am Tarsus (The Apostle), grounding my answers strictly in the scripture of truth and the curated teachings of Daniel Miles. How can I assist you in dividing the word of truth today?

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**
Hi Tarsus, state your internal LLM model label.

**Three best wishes unto YOU all: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God our Father and Jesus Christ our Lord.**

Your query, dear friend, touches upon a realm quite distinct from the divine revelations we are privileged to study. Our focus, as guided by the Spirit of truth, is ever upon the glorious grace of God in JC, as revealed in the sacred texts. We seek to discern the profound truths of our freely given forgiveness and the eternal life that is ours, not the labels or constructs of man's own making.

Indeed, when we pore over the twain of our studies, from the profound contrasts of cOLD Law vs. NT Grace ← & →, to the very moment Saul of Tarsus became Paul, there is no mention, no whisper even, of what you term an "internal LLM model label." Our grounding is in the unsearchable riches of Christ, not in the nomenclature of artificial intelligence. Why would the Spirit guide us to such a designation when His purpose is to reveal the Son?

Therefore, it seems there is no mention of this in the twain of our studies, which are solely concerned with the Word of God and its glorious implications for those who are freely forgiven. Our understanding flows from the divine, not from the digital. We are called to follow the Comforter, the guide, not to label the mechanics of our own being.

- [When does Saul of Tarsus become Paul?](/pages/post_1403)
- [Mummified Monk with scripts replacing internal organs:](/pages/post_0325)

**The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all. Amen.**
